response.step_by_step_log:
1. Identified 'Kiss me' by FUWAMOCO via search. Found it is a cover of Sixpence None the Richer.
2. Identified 'トライアングル・ドリーマー' (Triangle Dreamer) from on-screen text. Used search to identify Niji no Conquistador as original artist. On-screen text at 01:12 attributes the arrangement to Camellia (かめりあ).
3. Used simple queries: '"Kiss me" FUWAMOCO Japanese and English lyrics' and '"トライアングル・ドリーマー" Niji no Conquistador Japanese and English lyrics'.
4. Extracted lyrics and matched to song structure.
response.global_summary: A 2-song medley performed by FUWAMOCO and fellow VTubers, starting with 'Kiss me' followed by a transition to 'Triangle Dreamer'.

scenes.description: VTubers perform 'Kiss me' on a brightly lit, decorated stage.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Kiss me, out of the bearded barley
Nightly, beside the green, green grass
Swing, swing, swing the spinning step
You wear those shoes and I will wear that dress
Oh, kiss me, beneath the milky twilight
Lead me, out on the moonlit floor
Lift your open hand
Strike up the band and make the fireflies dance
Silver moon's sparkling
So kiss me
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Kiss me, out of the bearded barley
Nightly, beside the green, green grass
Swing, swing, swing the spinning step
You wear those shoes and I will wear that dress
Oh, kiss me, beneath the milky twilight
Lead me, out on the moonlit floor
Lift your open hand
Strike up the band and make the fireflies dance
Silver moon's sparkling
So kiss me

scenes.description: The performers transition and begin 'Triangle Dreamer' while colorful bubbles and lights fill the stage. On-screen text attributes lyrics/music to Camellia.
scenes.song_title: トライアングル・ドリーマー (Triangle Dreamer)
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Day by day 日に日に募るの乙女心
おんなじクラス斜め前のおとなしい人
カッコ良くはない だけど優しい
いつも頼れる彼
after school 恋愛相談の帰り道
なんだって話せる親友の女の子
スポーツ万能 勉強もできて
女子力MAXです
どこにでもある よくあること
急に彼女が
「あのね、実は私好きな人が…」
三角形、三角形の恋はきまぐれ
一瞬で、一瞬で崩れるバランス
ベタな漫画みたいなフラグ
まさかね自分か立っちゃうなんて
残念すぎます！
三角形、三角形の恋は不安定
なんちゃって、なんちゃってじゃ済まないカテゴリー
恋と友情 ゆらゆらめいて
なんか青春しちゃいます
わたし困っちゃいます
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Day by day, the maiden's heart grows stronger
The quiet boy in the seat diagonally in front of me in class
He isn't cool, but he's kind
He's always the one I can rely on
After school, on the way home from talking about love
My best friend, who I can tell anything to
She's good at sports, smart at studies, and has maximum feminine charm
It happens everywhere, the usual thing
Suddenly, she said: "You know, actually, I have a crush on someone..."
A triangle, a triangle love, so fickle
In an instant, in an instant, the balance collapses
A flag like in a bad manga
I never thought I'd be the one standing there, what a disappointment
A triangle, a triangle love is unstable
A triangle, a triangle, it's not a category you can just ignore
Love and friendship, swaying, swaying
Something like youth, I'm already...
I'm in trouble.
